title: coleus angulatus
intro: Coleus angulatus, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of India and Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Coleus angulatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional.
